transcript:
Speaker A (AI): ಏನಾಯ್ತು [What happened?] 
Speaker B (Human): I am very sentiment. 
Speaker A (AI): 'I AM VERY SENTIMENTAL' ಅಂತ ಹೇಳಬೇಕು ಅಥವಾ 'I'M AN EMOTIONAL PERSON' ಅಂತ ಹೇಳಬೇಕು. [You should say 'I AM VERY SENTIMENTAL' or 'I'M AN EMOTIONAL PERSON'.] 
Speaker B (Human): ಓ ಹೌದಾ, ಅದು ಸರಿ. ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು? [Oh is it, that's right. How to learn English?] 
Speaker A (AI): ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆಗೆ daily 15 minutes practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. ಒಂದು ತಿಂಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily. You can learn English in one month.] 
Speaker B (Human): ಓ, ಇವೆಲ್ಲ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಖರ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [Oh, all this will cost a lot, right?] 
Speaker A (AI): ಕೇವಲ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಈ ಆಪ್ ಅನ್ನ try ಮಾಡಿ ನೋಡಬಹುದು. 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಹೆಚ್ಚು ಜನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app for just 1 rupee. More than 1 crore people are learning English with me.] 
Speaker B (Human): ವಾವ್, ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗ್ಬೇಕು? [Wow, how to join?] 
Speaker A (AI): ಈಗಲೇ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಲು ಶುರು ಮಾಡು. [Download MySivi app now and start learning English.] 
Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on install now and download MySivi app.

summary: A split-screen Kannada ad where an AI avatar corrects a human's English grammar mistake. The AI explains that users can practice English for 15 minutes daily to learn in a month. It promotes the MySivi app, offering a trial for just 1 rupee, and ends with a call to action to download the app.
